description: You are the System Administrator for a newly deployed OpenProject instance in Berlin. Login as admin (password: Admin1234!) and configure the global system settings to match local regional standards: set the time zone to '(GMT+01:00) Berlin', the start of the week to 'Monday', the date format to '31.01.2012' (DD.MM.YYYY), and the time format to '14:00' (24-hour HH:MM).
